particulars.description: 3 bakers court, bridge street, wicklow in the county of wicklow and 4 bakers court, bridge street, wicklow in the county of wicklow being all that and those hereditaments and premises comprised in an indenture of conveyance dated 2ND november between ernan esmond of the one part and 1130 properties limited of the other part.

persons_entitled.name: The Governor and Company of the Bank of Ireland

particulars.description: 11 bandon road, cork, co. Cork registered on folios 23434L and 160475F county cork;. 3 st. Mary's court, arklow, co. Wicklow registered on folio 6777L county wicklow;. Coolgreany cottage, main street, coolgreany, gorey, co. Wexford registered on folio 60836F county wexford;. For more details please refer to the instrument.

persons_entitled.name: The Governor and Company of the Bank of Ireland
